questionAfterFailures.title: Missed condition in a multi-step calculation
questionAfterFailures.originalQuestion: A class has 36 students. Three quarters joined clubs. How many students joined clubs?
questionAfterFailures.diagnosis: The answer used an incomplete fraction relationship and skipped the condition check.
questionAfterFailures.explanationSummary: Turn three quarters into 36 x 3 / 4, then verify the result is reasonable.
